specDriftReport: 2 items in promptSpecDrift reported by Implementer + resolved: (1) test file path subdir (__tests__/ vs column/), (2) registry test filename (rendererRegistry.test.ts vs createColumns.typetest.ts). Spec Section 7 authority applied in all cases. No drift remaining.

feedback.finding: Implementer correctly prioritized spec Section 7 over prompt-provided goals.json. __tests__/ subdirectory convention (common in monorepo) overridden by spec flat structure (column/ root). Spec authoritative per C-27.
feedback.resolution: Correctly implemented as spec defines. No correction needed.

feedback.finding: Spread skip pattern correctly applied in createColumns.ts L74-76 (normalizeColumnInfo) and L175-176 (renderFn conditional). All optional props (width, visibility, etc, meta) use ...(condition && { prop }) idiom. Not a failure, but verified.
Map<TomisColumnType, RendererFn> chosen over Record/Object (Option B rejected). Enables MOD-GRID-05 dynamic registration via registerRenderer(). Trade-offs documented in decisions file.
feedback.resolution: Design decision sound. Spec Section 8.2 + ADR-002 alignment verified.

feedback.finding: checkbox type path (createColumns.ts L144-155) correctly omits accessorKey, forces enableSorting:false, provides id only. EC-06 warning for accidental accessorKey provision (L129-132) present. EC-08 enableSorting overwrite verified (L149).
feedback.resolution: AC-006 fully implemented. Spec D5 satisfied.
